stemHtml: A stressful situation during flight (such as a flight control problem during weather avoidance) may cause an increase in the rate of breathing which may lead to hyperventilation. Hyperventilation will cause a reduction in the (1) _____ level in the body, and may lead to (2) _____.

options.a: (1) carbon dioxide; (2) a false sense of euphoria
options.b: (1) oxygen; (2) a false sense of euphoria
